name: orca-extension
description: Orca browser extension (Firefox first, Chrome-portable): submit videos to your self-hosted Orca over the same E2EE secure channel as the web UI, and download them straight from any video page.

scripts.dev:
npm run build && librewolf 'about:debugging#/runtime/this-firefox' && echo '
>> 点 Load Temporary Add-on，选择: dist-ext/manifest.json  （改代码后重跑 npm run dev 并在该页点 Reload）'
scripts.dist: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run package
scripts.dist:userscript: npm run typecheck && npm run build:userscript
